name: Cold Pressed Oil
shortDescription: Pure cold-pressed oil extracted traditionally — no heat, no chemicals, full nutrition.
description: Our cold-pressed oils are extracted using traditional wooden ghani (press) method with no heat or chemicals. This preserves natural vitamins, flavour, and aroma that refined oils lose during processing.

name: Pappu Nune
shortDescription: Traditional Pappu Nune (lentil oil) — a rare and nutritious cooking oil.
description: Pappu Nune is a traditional oil pressed from lentils, used in Andhra cooking for its distinct flavour and nutritional benefits. A rare traditional product made fresh in small batches.

name: Jonna Idly
shortDescription: Soft and healthy Jonna (Sorghum) Idly — a nutritious traditional millet breakfast.
description: Freshly made Jonna Idly using sorghum millet batter. A traditional Andhra breakfast that is rich in fibre, gluten-free, and ideal for all ages including diabetics.

name: Millet Dosa
shortDescription: Crispy millet dosa — traditional, healthy, and gluten-free.
description: Millet Dosa made from a blend of healthy millets. Crispy, light, and packed with nutrients. A great alternative to regular rice dosa for health-conscious families.

name: Ragi Idly
shortDescription: Soft Ragi (Finger Millet) Idly — calcium-rich and traditionally made.
description: Ragi Idly made with finger millet, the highest source of natural calcium among grains. Soft, nutritious, and ideal for children and growing families.

name: Vegetable Idly
shortDescription: Colourful vegetable idly packed with nutrition and natural goodness.
description: Soft idly stuffed with fresh vegetables and traditional spices. Made with natural colours from vegetables only — no artificial colours. A wholesome breakfast for the whole family.

name: Chegodi
shortDescription: Crispy traditional Chegodi rings made in pure oil — a classic Andhra snack.
description: Chegodi is a classic Andhra snack made with rice flour, sesame seeds, and mild spices. Fried in pure groundnut oil for authentic taste and long-lasting crunch.

name: Janthikalu
shortDescription: Traditional Janthikalu made with rice flour and fresh spices — crispy and flavourful.
description: Janthikalu are spiral-shaped rice flour snacks deep-fried in pure oil. A popular Andhra festival snack made fresh in small batches with no artificial flavours.

name: Jonna Chekkalu
shortDescription: Crispy Jonna (Jowar) Chekkalu — a healthy millet-based traditional snack.
description: Jonna Chekkalu are rice crackers made with jowar (sorghum) flour. A healthier take on the traditional chekkalu snack, rich in fibre and made in pure oil.

name: Boondi Mixture
shortDescription: Crunchy Boondi Mixture with a perfect blend of spices and freshness.
description: Our Boondi Mixture is made fresh with crunchy boondi, peanuts, curry leaves, and spices. Fried in pure groundnut oil with no artificial flavours or colourings.

name: Chekkalu
shortDescription: Classic rice crackers (Chekkalu) made with sesame seeds and pure oil.
description: Chekkalu are traditional rice flour crackers with sesame seeds and spices. Crispy, light, and freshly made in pure groundnut oil. A timeless Andhra snack for all occasions.

name: Karam Poosa
shortDescription: Spicy and crispy Karam Poosa — a beloved Andhra tea-time snack.
description: Karam Poosa is a spicy gram flour-based snack made with fresh green chillies, curry leaves, and spices. Fried in pure oil for an authentic, addictive crunch.

name: Sakinalu
shortDescription: Traditional Sakinalu — a festive Sankranti snack made with sesame and rice flour.
description: Sakinalu are handmade festive snacks made with rice flour and sesame seeds. A traditional Sankranti special from Andhra Pradesh, fried in pure oil to golden perfection.

name: Coconut Chutney
shortDescription: Freshly made coconut chutney — smooth, aromatic, and traditionally prepared.
description: Our Coconut Chutney is made fresh from grated coconut, roasted gram, and traditional tempering. No vinegar, no artificial flavours — just pure, authentic taste.

name: Ginger Chutney
shortDescription: Tangy Ginger (Allam) Chutney made with fresh ginger and traditional spices.
description: Allam Chutney is made from fresh ginger, tamarind, and jaggery in perfect balance. Pairs beautifully with idly, dosa, and pesarattu. A digestive-friendly chutney loved across Telugu households.

name: Coriander Chutney
shortDescription: Fresh coriander chutney bursting with natural flavour and green goodness.
description: Fresh coriander leaves blended with green chillies, lemon, and spices to create this vibrant chutney. No artificial colour — the natural green colour comes from fresh coriander.

name: Tomato Chutney
shortDescription: Tangy and spicy homemade tomato chutney — perfect with idly and dosa.
description: Made from fresh ripe tomatoes, onions, and traditional spices. This tangy chutney is a household favourite across South India. No artificial colour, no vinegar.

name: Onion Gongura Chutney
shortDescription: Classic Andhra-style Onion Gongura Chutney with authentic tangy flavour.
description: Gongura (sorrel leaves) combined with fresh onions and traditional spices create this iconic Andhra chutney. Tangy, spicy, and packed with iron and vitamins.

name: Green Chilli Chutney
shortDescription: Fiery green chilli chutney for those who love bold, spicy flavours.
description: Fresh green chillies tempered with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and spices. Bold, hot, and flavourful — this chutney adds a punch to any meal. Naturally coloured from fresh chillies.

name: Avakaya
shortDescription: Classic Andhra Avakaya — raw mango pickle made in pure sesame oil with bold spices.
description: Classic Avakaya — Andhra-style raw mango pickle made with freshly ground spices and pure sesame oil. No vinegar, no preservatives. Matures to perfection in traditional clay jars.

name: Sweet Avakaya
shortDescription: Sweet raw mango pickle — a milder, sweeter take on the classic Avakaya.
description: Sweet Avakaya is a popular variation of the classic Andhra mango pickle made with jaggery and mild spices. Less spicy, naturally sweet, and loved by all ages including children.

name: Magaya
shortDescription: Magaya — raw mango pickle with fenugreek and traditional Andhra spices.
description: Magaya is a unique Andhra-style raw mango pickle made with tender mango pieces, fenugreek seeds, and bold spices. Distinct from avakaya with its own deep, rich flavour profile.

name: Dabbakaya Pickle
shortDescription: Dabbakaya pickle — made from a special round mango variety with bold Andhra spices.
description: Dabbakaya is a traditional Andhra pickle made from a unique round mango variety known for its firm texture and distinct sourness. Made with pure sesame oil and freshly ground spices.

name: Tomato Pickle
shortDescription: Tangy homemade tomato pickle with fresh tomatoes and traditional spices.
description: Made from fresh ripe tomatoes, sesame oil, and bold Andhra spices. This tangy pickle is a household favourite that pairs perfectly with hot rice, idly, and dosa.

name: Pandu Mirapakaya Pickle
shortDescription: Red chilli (Pandu Mirapakaya) pickle — bold, fiery, and traditionally made.
description: Pandu Mirapakaya Pickle is made from fresh red chillies pickled in pure sesame oil with mustard and traditional spices. Fiery, bold, and deeply flavourful — for those who love heat.

name: Usirikaya Pickle
shortDescription: Gooseberry (Usirikaya) pickle — tangy, vitamin C-rich, and traditionally made.
description: Usirikaya Pickle is made from fresh Indian gooseberries (amla) pickled with mustard, sesame oil, and traditional Andhra spices. Rich in Vitamin C and known for its health benefits.

name: Chintakaya Pickle
shortDescription: Tamarind (Chintakaya) pickle — a unique tangy Andhra delicacy.
description: Chintakaya Pickle is made from tender raw tamarind with traditional Andhra spices. A rare, season-specific pickle with a distinctive deep tangy flavour unlike any other.

name: Gongura Pickle
shortDescription: Authentic Andhra Gongura pickle — tangy, spicy, and full of iron.
description: Gongura Pickle is made from fresh sorrel (Gongura) leaves cooked with sesame oil, red chillies, and traditional Andhra spices. Tangy, spicy, and packed with iron and vitamins.

name: Allam Pickle
shortDescription: Traditional ginger (Allam) pickle — tangy, warming, and digestive.
description: Allam Pickle is made from fresh ginger pieces pickled in tamarind, mustard, and traditional spices. Warming, digestive, and full of bold flavour. A classic Andhra condiment.

name: Nimmakaya Pickle
shortDescription: Classic lemon (Nimmakaya) pickle — tangy and spicy with traditional spices.
description: Nimmakaya Pickle is made from fresh whole lemons pickled with salt, chilli, and traditional spices. Tangy, bright, and flavourful — a pantry staple in every Andhra household.

name: Kakarakaya Pickle
shortDescription: Bitter gourd (Kakarakaya) pickle — tangy, spicy, and traditionally made.
description: Kakarakaya Pickle is made from fresh bitter gourd cooked with traditional Andhra spices and pure sesame oil. A bold, tangy pickle that pairs perfectly with hot rice and ghee.

name: Idly Podi
shortDescription: Freshly ground Idly Podi with aromatic lentils and spices — best with ghee.
description: Our Idly Podi is made fresh from roasted urad dal, chana dal, sesame seeds, and red chillies. Freshly stone-ground for maximum aroma. Best enjoyed mixed with sesame oil or ghee.

name: Dosa Podi
shortDescription: Spicy and aromatic Dosa Podi — ideal sprinkled over a crispy hot dosa.
description: Dosa Podi is freshly made from roasted lentils, sesame, and red chillies ground to a coarse powder. Sprinkle over dosa with a drizzle of sesame oil for a complete Andhra breakfast.

name: Idly Karam
shortDescription: Spicy and aromatic Idly Karam — a bold chilli-lentil blend for idly and dosa.
description: Idly Karam is freshly made from roasted lentils, sesame, and red chillies ground to a coarse powder. Mix with sesame oil or ghee and serve alongside idly for an authentic Andhra breakfast.

name: Karam Podi
shortDescription: Spicy and aromatic Karam Podi — a bold Andhra-style chilli powder blend.
description: Karam Podi is a fiery red chilli powder blend made with fresh dried chillies, roasted lentils, and traditional spices. Stone-ground fresh for bold heat and deep flavour. Best mixed with hot rice and sesame oil.

name: Dhanyalu Podi
shortDescription: Freshly ground coriander seed podi with warm earthy flavour.
description: Dhanyalu Podi is made from freshly roasted and stone-ground coriander seeds. Adds depth and warmth to chutneys, gravies, and rice dishes. Pure spice with no fillers.

name: Kothimeera Podi
shortDescription: Aromatic dry coriander leaf powder — a versatile everyday kitchen spice.
description: Kothimeera Podi is made from dried fresh coriander leaves blended with traditional spices. Adds a fresh herbaceous note to dal, rice, and gravies. Stone-ground for authentic texture.

name: Kottimera Karam
shortDescription: Aromatic coriander (Kottimera) spice blend — fresh and flavourful.
description: Kottimera Karam is a traditional Andhra spice blend made with dried coriander leaves, red chillies, and spices. Adds bold flavour to rice, dosa, and snacks. Stone-ground fresh.

name: Munagaku Podi
shortDescription: Nutritious drumstick leaf (Moringa) powder — a natural health supplement.
description: Munagaku Podi is made from dried moringa leaves rich in iron, calcium, and vitamins. A traditional Andhra health food that can be mixed with rice or used as a seasoning.

name: Karakkaya Podi
shortDescription: Traditional Karakkaya (Chebulic Myrobalan) podi — digestive and medicinal.
description: Karakkaya Podi is made from sun-dried Chebulic Myrobalan (Haritaki) — an Ayurvedic ingredient known for digestive benefits. Stone-ground fresh for maximum potency.

name: Pesara Podi
shortDescription: Freshly ground green gram (Pesara) podi — protein-rich and delicious.
description: Pesara Podi is made from roasted green gram (moong dal) with traditional spices. Rich in protein and easy to digest. Mix with hot rice and ghee for a simple nutritious meal.

name: Nuvvula Podi
shortDescription: Sesame seed podi with rich nutty flavour — calcium-rich and tasty.
description: Nuvvula Podi is made from roasted sesame seeds ground with spices. Rich in calcium and healthy fats. Perfect with hot rice and ghee, or as a topping on dosa and idly.

name: Shonti Podi
shortDescription: Warming dry ginger (Shonti) powder — used in cooking and as a natural remedy.
description: Shonti Podi is made from sun-dried ginger root ground to a fine powder. Used in Andhra cooking for warmth and flavour, and traditionally consumed for digestion and immunity.

name: Miriyalu Podi
shortDescription: Freshly ground black pepper powder with sharp, bold flavour.
description: Miriyalu Podi is freshly stone-ground black pepper powder with bold, sharp flavour. Used in Andhra rasam, curries, and as a table spice. Pure pepper with no fillers or additives.

name: Sambar Podi
shortDescription: Aromatic homemade sambar podi ground fresh with traditional spice blends.
description: Our Sambar Podi is made from a traditional blend of coriander, cumin, red chillies, and other aromatic spices. Freshly roasted and stone-ground for deep, complex flavour in every pot.

name: Rassam Podi
shortDescription: Traditional Andhra rasam podi with perfect balance of spices and pepper.
description: Rassam Podi is a freshly stone-ground spice blend of black pepper, cumin, coriander, and red chillies. Makes a warming, digestive rasam with authentic Andhra flavour.

name: Velluli Podi
shortDescription: Pure garlic (Velluli) powder with bold flavour — no fillers, just pure garlic.
description: Made from sun-dried garlic cloves ground to a fine powder. Intense garlic flavour for use in masalas, marinades, and everyday cooking. Pure and unadulterated.

name: Masala Powder
shortDescription: Freshly blended traditional masala powder for curries and gravies.
description: Our Masala Powder is a blend of whole spices freshly roasted and ground. Each batch is prepared traditionally to ensure consistent depth of flavour in your everyday curries.

name: Jellakarra Podi
shortDescription: Freshly ground cumin (Jeelakarra) powder with bold earthy aroma.
description: Jellakarra Podi is made from freshly roasted and ground cumin seeds. Rich in digestive properties and deep earthy flavour. Used in dals, rasam, rice, and traditional Andhra recipes.

name: Kobbari Podi
shortDescription: Freshly made coconut (Kobbari) podi — nutty and aromatic.
description: Kobbari Podi is made from freshly dried and ground coconut with traditional spices. Rich, nutty flavour that pairs beautifully with idly, dosa, and hot rice. Made fresh in small batches.

name: Pudina Podi
shortDescription: Aromatic dried mint (Pudina) powder — refreshing and flavourful.
description: Pudina Podi is made from dried fresh mint leaves blended with spices. Adds a cool, refreshing flavour to rice, chutneys, and snacks. A traditional digestive-friendly spice powder.

name: Kakarakayya Podi
shortDescription: Bitter gourd (Kakarakayya) powder — a traditional health remedy.
description: Kakarakayya Podi is made from dried and powdered bitter gourd. A traditional Andhra health food known for its blood sugar balancing and digestive properties. Stone-ground fresh.

name: Veerusenaga Podi
shortDescription: Nutritious horsegram (Veerusenaga) powder — protein-packed traditional food.
description: Veerusenaga Podi is made from roasted horsegram ground with traditional spices. Rich in protein and iron. A highly nutritious traditional Andhra powder best mixed with rice and ghee.

name: Turmeric Powder
shortDescription: Pure natural turmeric powder — bright, aromatic, and traditionally ground.
description: Our Turmeric Powder is made from sun-dried whole turmeric roots ground fresh. Bright golden colour, strong aroma, and natural medicinal properties make it a kitchen and wellness essential.

name: Kumkum
shortDescription: Traditional natural Kumkum — pure and traditionally prepared.
description: Traditional Kumkum prepared naturally without chemical dyes. Used in daily worship and rituals. Prepared the traditional way to preserve its purity and significance.

name: Fenugreek Powder
shortDescription: Freshly ground fenugreek (Methi) powder — bitter, warming, and medicinal.
description: Fenugreek Powder is made from roasted fenugreek seeds ground to a fine powder. Used in Andhra cooking as a spice and known for its blood sugar-regulating and digestive properties.

name: Coriander Powder
shortDescription: Pure coriander powder — freshly ground with warm, earthy flavour.
description: Our Coriander Powder is made from freshly roasted whole coriander seeds stone-ground to a fine powder. Rich aroma and natural flavour for everyday cooking and spice blends.

name: Ulava Pindi
shortDescription: Pure horsegram (Ulava) flour — nutritious and traditionally milled.
description: Ulava Pindi is freshly milled horsegram flour packed with protein, iron, and fibre. Used in traditional Andhra recipes like ulava charu and as a health supplement.

name: Minapappu Podi
shortDescription: Freshly ground urad dal (Minapappu) flour — a versatile cooking essential.
description: Minapappu Podi is freshly milled urad dal flour. Used in traditional South Indian cooking for making idly, dosa batter, vadas, and more. Pure and freshly ground without additives.

name: Ravva Dosa Mix
shortDescription: Ready-to-use Ravva Dosa mix — crispy, instant, and traditionally flavoured.
description: Our Ravva Dosa Mix is a pre-blended flour mix for making crispy semolina dosas instantly. No fermentation required — just add water and cook for a quick, authentic Andhra breakfast.

name: Sanaga Pindi
shortDescription: Pure chickpea (Sanaga) flour — freshly ground and ideal for many recipes.
description: Sanaga Pindi is freshly milled chickpea (chana dal) flour. Used in Andhra cooking for making pakoras, snacks, gravies, and batters. High in protein and freshly ground without additives.

name: Barley Powder
shortDescription: Nutritious barley powder — a traditional health supplement.
description: Barley Powder is made from freshly roasted and ground barley grain. Rich in fibre, vitamins, and minerals. Consumed as a health drink or used in cooking for its cooling and nutritious properties.

name: Pesara Pappu Mix
shortDescription: Ready-to-cook green gram (Pesara Pappu) mix — healthy, quick, and nutritious.
description: Pesara Pappu Mix is a pre-prepared moong dal blend ready for cooking. Rich in protein and easy to digest. Perfect for quick, healthy dals and traditional Andhra pesarattu batter.
